chunks.title: Law on Remarriage after Divorce
chunks.reason: A complete legal case regarding a woman divorced twice.

chunks.title: Laws on Newlyweds and Leapers
chunks.reason: Distinct legal statutes regarding new wives, millstones, and leprosy.

chunks.title: Laws on Loans and Wages
chunks.reason: A coherent unit covering the treatment of debtors and hired workers.

chunks.title: Laws on Justice and Harvest
chunks.reason: Legal instructions on judicial accountability, social justice, and agricultural charity.
